commands.cmd:
status=$(MYSQL_PWD="${HOSTLENS_MYSQL_PWD:-}" mysql -s --connect-timeout=5 -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u mon \
  -e 'SHOW REPLICA STATUS\G') || { echo "mysql show replica status failed" >&2; exit 1; }
if [ -z "$status" ]; then
  printf '{"replication_configured":false,"link_healthy":false,"lag_seconds":null}'
  exit 0
fi
io=$(printf '%s\n' "$status" | awk -F': ' '/^[[:space:]]*Replica_IO_Running:/{gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t\r]+$/,"",$2);print $2; exit}')
sql=$(printf '%s\n' "$status" | awk -F': ' '/^[[:space:]]*Replica_SQL_Running:/{gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t\r]+$/,"",$2);print $2; exit}')
sbs=$(printf '%s\n' "$status" | awk -F': ' '/^[[:space:]]*Seconds_Behind_Source:/{gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t\r]+$/,"",$2);print $2; exit}')
if [ -z "$io" ] || [ -z "$sql" ]; then
  echo "replica status columns missing (Replica_IO_Running/Replica_SQL_Running)" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [ "$io" = "Yes" ] && [ "$sql" = "Yes" ]; then
  link=true
else
  link=false
fi
case "$sbs" in
  NULL|'')
    lag=null
    ;;
  *[!0-9]*)
    echo "Seconds_Behind_Source non-numeric: $sbs" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
  *)
    lag=$sbs
    ;;
esac
printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":%s,"lag_seconds":%s}' "$link" "$lag"
